name: Goldenstone Acquisition Limited Rights
summary: Goldenstone Acquisition Limited Rights entitles the holder to receive a portion of a share of common stock upon the consummation of a business combination. Goldenstone Acquisition Limited is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. Goldenstone Acquisition Limited is based in the United States.
